WHAT CAN YOU PROPOSE FOR BELOW VERY VERY CLOSE LADY-NAME AND RATED BIZ WILL BE HIGHLY APPRECIATED.
Always put vessel name in subject
AFTER PUTTING ONE VSL ON SUBJECT FOR SHORT PERIOD  (WAITING SUB TILL 1900 HRS TODAY).
NOW FULLY CONCENTRATING TO FIX BELOW LADY AGAINST YOUR FULL SUPPORT
MV WAN TONG 18
(10K),               OPEN S.KOREA PORT EITHER INCHON OR KUNSAN OR ULSAN O/A 04TH FEBRUARY
SD, DECK CARGO, GEARED/SWL 25MTS, TRY ANY.     –
VOYAGE / TCT /TC   ALL WORKABLE
M/V WAN TONG 18
IMO NO. 9665944, FLAG CHINA, BLT 2012, CLASS CCS,
LOA/ LBP/ BM/ DEPTH 134.20/ 126.38/ 18.60/ 10.10M, GRT/ NRT 7,481/ 3,789,
DWT/ DWCC 10,700/ 10,000MT ON DFT 7.40M, GRAIN/ BALE CAPA 13,456/ 13,188CBM,
4HO/4HA, HATCH SIZE: NO.1&2&3&4 14.60X10.90M,
HOLD SIZE: NO.1 22.40x14.35M, NO.2&3 23.06x14.35M, NO.4 23.08x14.35M,
TPC 21.29MT, CRANE NO.1& 2  SWL 25MTS, HYDRAULIC HATCH COVER,
SD, STL BTM, P&I AND IMSBC COVERED / ADA/
SPEED AND FUEL CONSUMPTION/ 24 HRS IN GOOD WEATHER:
AT SEA: SPD BALLAST 11.0KTS LSFO(180CST) ON ABT 6.3MT & LSMGO 0.7MT;
SPD LADEN 10.5KTS LSFO(180CST) ON ABT 6.5MT & LSMGO 0.7MT.
IN PORT: IDLE LSMGO 0.5MT +BOILER LSMGO 0.3MT; EXTRA LSMGO 0.5MT IN WINTER.
WORKING: LSMGO 2.0MT; EXTRA LSMGO 0.5MT IN WINTER.
(THE TERM "ABT" MEANS +/-5% FOR BOTH SPEED AND CONSUMPTION IN SHIP\'S FAVOR)
FOR THE PURPOSES OF CALCULATING VESSEL PERFORMANCE UNDER THIS C/P, IT IS AGREED THAT GOOD WEATHER CONDITION IS BASIS, SMOOTH SEA, 24 CONSECUTIVE HOURS (FROM NOON TO NOON)
WITH NO ADVERSE CURRENT AND NO NEGATIVE INFLUENCE OF SWELL. ALL DAYS WHERE THE WEATHER EXCEEDS BEAUFORT FORCE 4 (MAX 16 KNOTS) AND/OR DOUGLAS SEA STATE 3 (0.5 – 1.25M)
AND/OR SIGNIFICANT WAVE HEIGHT UP TO 1.25 M AND/OR ADVERSE CURRENT AND NEGATIVE INFLUENCE OF SWELL ARE EXPRESSLY EXCLUDED FROM CALCULATIONS. ALWAYS EXCLUDING
PERIODS DURING WHICH REDUCTIONS OF SPEED FOR SAFETY, REDUCED VISIBILITY, STEAMING AND/OR MANEUVERING IN CONGESTED WATERS/STRAITS, IN/OUT PORTS ETC
/ ADA/
PLEASED TO HEAR YR BEST INDI OR OFFER FIRM ALONGWITH CHRRS NAME/IDEA AND TERMS FOR QUICK DEVELOPMENT.
